query:
SELECT e.id, e.expenseDate, e.amount, e.targetType, e.categoryTarget
FROM expenses e
WHERE e.targetType = 'category' AND e.categoryTarget = 2 AND e.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY e.expenseDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
